Errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
Errors.storyNotAvailableYet: This story is not available yet.
Errors.storySignInRequired: This story is locked. Please sign in with the same account that created this story, then try the link again.
Errors.storyWrongAccount: This story belongs to another account. Sign in with the account that received the story email, then open the link again.
Errors.noPermission: You do not have permission to access this story.
Errors.failedToLoad: Failed to load the story. Please try again.
Errors.noChaptersFoundDesc: This story doesn't have any chapters!
Errors.chapterNotFoundDesc: The requested chapter could not be found.
Errors.failedToPlayAudio: Failed to play audio. Please try again.
Errors.failedToLoadAudio: Failed to load audio. Please check your internet connection and try again.
Errors.audioPlaybackInteractionRequired: Audio playback requires user interaction. Please try clicking the play button again.
Errors.audioFormatNotSupported: This audio format is not supported by your browser.
Errors.failedToDownloadAudio: Failed to download audio. Please try again.
